item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 9min “Phil said he almost saved me but he was six foot over to the other side so how is he going to
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 9min “Phil said he almost saved me but he was six foot over to the other side so how is he going to stop me there.”
Robert Thornton admits he nearly FELL OFF the stage during a Premier League clash with Taylor.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/thornton-nearl y-falls-off-stage/ …
In association with Mostrar más 91

item.title:
owenbates180: Josh reposteó Owen Bates @owenbates180 · 35min Good week for myself this weekend!
Couple of wins. Few 100 averages and
item.description:
Josh reposteó Owen Bates @owenbates180 · 35min Good week for myself this weekend!
Couple of wins. Few 100 averages and a 9 darter. Missed a handful at tops for a euro tour.
Ps. These new wimmau dart boards are by far the worst standard of board I’ve ever played on.
Big thanks to all my sponsors for their support! 9 6 60 2 mil

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 13min Gary Wilson talks to Live Snooker about the new Crucible deal:
‘It’s not the ideal
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 13min Gary Wilson talks to Live Snooker about the new Crucible deal:
‘It’s not the ideal that we were all hoping for. You feel happy in one sense, but slightly negative in the sense you’re stuck there with that for the next 20 years, and it’s only a little bit better.’
#Snooker 1 104

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 13min Gary Wilson tells Live Snooker the new Crucible deal leaves a ‘sour taste’.
‘The i
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 13min Gary Wilson tells Live Snooker the new Crucible deal leaves a ‘sour taste’.
‘The ideal for everybody would have been to maybe knock it down and rebuild it.
‘This feels like a bit of a halfway house where you can take what you get, which leaves a little bit of a sour taste.’ 1 134

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 24min INTERVAL SCORES!
Who will complete the lineup at the Crucible?
Tune in from 4:50PM BST to find
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 24min INTERVAL SCORES!
Who will complete the lineup at the Crucible?
Tune in from 4:50PM BST to find out...
#JudgementDay 3 2 11 1 mil
